title: 一鍵式閃測儀軟體開發手冊
summary: Comprehensive developer reference manual for building a one-click flash optical measurement system in C# WPF with HALCON, covering principles, setup, architecture, and per-feature implementation.
notes: Type provided authoritatively by manifest (DOC); large prose-heavy development reference manual with tutorials and code examples, no decision or requirement contract. No markdown links to other docs found; only file-format references (.zcp, .shm, appsettings.json).
